{% from "macros/associated_files.html" import af_popup, af_popup_init %} {% from "macros/user_badge.html" import user_badge %} {% if files %} {% for file in files %} {% set assoc_count = file.subtitle_count + file.sidecar_count %} {{ file.filename }} {{ file.size_display }} {{ af_popup(file.associated_files or [], assoc_count) }} {% if eviction_enabled %} {{ file.priority_score }} {% endif %} {% if file.is_pinned %} Pinned {% endif %} {% if file.is_ondeck %} OnDeck {% endif %} {% if file.is_watchlist %} Watchlist {% endif %} {% if not file.is_ondeck and not file.is_watchlist and not file.is_pinned %} {% if file.source == 'ondeck' %} Stale OnDeck {% elif file.source == 'watchlist' %} Stale Watchlist {% else %} Other {% endif %} {% endif %} {% if file.users %} {% for user in file.users %} {{ user_badge(user, user_types, style='margin-right: 0.25rem;') }} {% endfor %} {% else %} - {% endif %} {{ file.cache_age_hours|round(1) }}h {% endfor %} {% else %} No cached items{% if source_filter != 'all' or search %} matching filters{% endif %} {% endif %} {% if files %}
{{ totals.total_files }} items {{ totals.total_size_display }} total {% if totals.pinned_count|default(0) > 0 %} Pinned {{ totals.pinned_count }} {% endif %} OnDeck {{ totals.ondeck_count }} Watchlist {{ totals.watchlist_count }} {% if totals.other_count > 0 %} Other {{ totals.other_count }} {% endif %}
{% endif %} {{ af_popup_init('cache-table-body') }}
